name: Dave Poulson's Excavating
tagline: Owner-operated excavating and grading across Sonoma County
seoDescription: Dave Poulson's Excavating in Santa Rosa, CA. Owner-run excavation, grading, demolition, site work and driveways with 40+ years experience. Free estimates.

sections.heading: Excavating and grading done right, by the owner who runs the machine

sections.heading: About Dave Poulson's Excavating
body: Dave Poulson's Excavating is a locally owned and operated excavation contractor based at 620 Clover Drive in Santa Rosa, serving Sonoma County. Owner Dave Poulson brings over 40 years of hands-on experience to every project, and he's on site for every job — so the person you hire is the person running the equipment.

From clearing and grading land to demolition, driveways, and site work, no job is too big or too small. The focus is straightforward: accurate, professional work and customer satisfaction, with every job backed by a 100% guarantee.
highlights: Over 40 years of hands-on excavation experience
Owner Dave Poulson is on every job site
Locally owned and operated in Santa Rosa, Sonoma County
No job too big or too small — all work 100% guaranteed

items.title: Excavation & Site Work
items.description: Full-service excavation and site preparation for residential and commercial projects of any size, from foundations and footings to complete site work.

items.title: Grading & Land Clearing
items.description: Clearing and grading land for projects large and small, getting your site level, drained, and ready to build.

items.title: Demolition & Removals
items.description: Structure demolition and removal, including mobile-home demolition and pad work, with courteous, professional crews.

items.title: Driveways
items.description: New driveway construction and improvements built to hold up to Sonoma County weather and use.

items.title: Trucking, Loading & Rip Rap
items.description: Hauling, loading, and rock and rip rap placement for erosion control, drainage, and site stabilization.

items.title: Pools & Specialty Excavation
items.description: Swimming pool excavation and other specialty digging where precise, careful operation matters.

items.quote: There was never an issue with accuracy, professionalism or on site conduct. They were courteous to the residents and did their best to accommodate all the other traffic in the park with their large equipment.
items.author: Mobile home community manager, Santa Rosa

sections.heading: Work with Dave Poulson's Excavating
sections.body: Find us at 620 Clover Dr. Call (707) 526-1462 — we’re glad to help.
